title: exacum divaricatum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Exacum divaricatum subsp. divaricatum, also known as the Himalayan blue pimpernel, is a flowering plant species in the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Exacum divaricatum subsp. divaricatum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant. Exacum divaricatum subsp. divaricatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
